SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fastsimulation

Class KValueProcessResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fastsimulation.KValueProcessResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class KValueProcessResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from a K-value fast process simulation.

The result is component-resolved on a molar-flow basis. Convenience methods provide molar and mass totals for any named source, internal outlet, wrapper stream alias or terminal product stream included in the proxy result map.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • KValueProcessResult

      KValueProcessResult(String[] componentNames, double[] molarMass, Map<String,double[]> streamComponentFlows, List<String> terminalStreamNames, List<String> sourceStreamNames, int iterations, double maxResidual, long runTimeNanos)
      Creates a process result.
      Parameters:
      componentNames - component names; must be non-null
      molarMass - component molar masses in kg/mol; must match the component count
      streamComponentFlows - component flow map keyed by result stream name; values are mole/sec
      terminalStreamNames - terminal product stream keys; must be non-null
      sourceStreamNames - source stream names; must be non-null
      iterations - number of fixed-point iterations used
      maxResidual - final maximum relative residual
      runTimeNanos - wall-clock proxy runtime in nanoseconds

  • Method Details

    • getComponentNames

      public String[] getComponentNames()
      Gets the component names.
      Returns:
      copy of component names

    • getStreamNames

      public String[] getStreamNames()
      Gets all stream names present in the result.
      Returns:
      stream names in insertion order

    • getTerminalStreamNames

      public List<String> getTerminalStreamNames()
      Gets terminal stream names.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable terminal stream name list

    • getSourceStreamNames

      public List<String> getSourceStreamNames()
      Gets source stream names.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable source stream name list

    • getStreamComponentFlow

      public double getStreamComponentFlow(String streamName, String componentName, String unit)
      Gets the component flow for a stream.
      Parameters:
      streamName - result stream name
      componentName - component name
      unit - requested unit: mole/sec, mole/hr, kg/sec, or kg/hr
      Returns:
      component flow in the requested unit

    • getStreamTotalFlow

      public double getStreamTotalFlow(String streamName, String unit)
      Gets the total stream flow.
      Parameters:
      streamName - result stream name
      unit - requested unit: mole/sec, mole/hr, kg/sec, or kg/hr
      Returns:
      total stream flow in the requested unit

    • getStreamMoleFraction

      public double getStreamMoleFraction(String streamName, String componentName)
      Gets the mole fraction of a component in a stream.
      Parameters:
      streamName - result stream name
      componentName - component name
      Returns:
      mole fraction, or 0.0 for an empty stream

    • getTerminalTotalFlow

      public double getTerminalTotalFlow(String unit)
      Gets the total terminal product flow.
      Parameters:
      unit - requested unit: mole/sec, mole/hr, kg/sec, or kg/hr
      Returns:
      sum of all terminal stream flows in the requested unit

    • getIterations

      public int getIterations()
      Gets the number of fixed-point iterations used by the proxy.
      Returns:
      iteration count

    • getMaxResidual

      public double getMaxResidual()
      Gets the final maximum relative residual.
      Returns:
      maximum residual

    • getRunTimeNanos

      public long getRunTimeNanos()
      Gets the proxy wall-clock runtime.
      Returns:
      runtime in nanoseconds

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the result to JSON.
      Returns:
      pretty-printed JSON result

    • getComponentIndex

      private int getComponentIndex(String componentName)
      Finds a component index.
      Parameters:
      componentName - component name
      Returns:
      component index
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the component is not present

    • requireStream

      private double[] requireStream(String streamName)
      Gets a stream vector or throws a useful exception.
      Parameters:
      streamName - stream name
      Returns:
      component-flow vector in mole/sec
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the stream is not present

    • convertComponentFlow

      private double convertComponentFlow(double molePerSec, int componentIndex, String unit)
      Converts a component molar flow to the requested unit.
      Parameters:
      molePerSec - component molar flow in mole/sec
      componentIndex - component index
      unit - requested unit
      Returns:
      converted flow

    • copyFlowMap

      private static Map<String,double[]> copyFlowMap(Map<String,double[]> source)
      Copies a stream flow map defensively.
      Parameters:
      source - source map
      Returns:
      copied map
